EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISegmentCollection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that manipulate the segments of a path, ring, polyline, or polygon.

[Guid("B3FE6B20-4FC2-11D1-834E-0000F8775BE9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISegmentCollection

Properties

EnumCurve

A new curve enumerator for this segment collection.

IEnumCurve EnumCurve { get; }

Property Value

IEnumCurve

Examples

Sample Snippet

EnumSegments

A new enumerator for this segment collection.

IEnumSegment EnumSegments { get; }

IEnumSegment

A new indexed segment enumerator for this segment collection.

queryGeometry IGeometry

IEnumSegment

Segment[int]

A reference to the ith segment.

i int

SegmentCount

The number of segments.

int SegmentCount { get; }

void AddSegmentCollection(ISegmentCollection segments)

Parameters

segments ISegmentCollection

AddSegments(int, ref ISegment)

Adds references to segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void AddSegments(int Count, ref ISegment newSegments)

Parameters

Count int
newSegments ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasNonLinearSegments(ref bool)

Indicates if this segment collection contains segments other than lines.

void HasNonLinearSegments(ref bool nonLinearSegments)

Parameters

nonLinearSegments bool

Index int
start int
Count int
newSegments ISegmentCollection

InsertSegments(int, int, ref ISegment)

Inserts references to the input segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void InsertSegments(int Index, int Count, ref ISegment newSegments)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
newSegments ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

QuerySegments(int, int, out ISegment)

Returns references to some of the input segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void QuerySegments(int Index, int Count, out ISegment segments)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
segments ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

RemoveSegments(int, int, bool)

Removes references to some segments. If closeGap is TRUE, then any remaining internal gap in the path, ring, polyline or polygon is connected with a single line segment.

void RemoveSegments(int Index, int Count, bool closeGap)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
closeGap bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceSegmentCollection(int, int, ISegmentCollection) 

void ReplaceSegmentCollection(int Index, int goingAway, ISegmentCollection newSegments)

Parameters

Index int
goingAway int
newSegments ISegmentCollection

ReplaceSegments(int, int, int, ref ISegment)

Removes and inserts from segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void ReplaceSegments(int Index, int comingIn, int goingAway, ref ISegment newSegments)

Parameters

Index int
comingIn int
goingAway int
newSegments ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

SegmentsChanged()

Informs the segment collection that any cached values that it may be maintaining (envelope, length, etc.) are invalid. Use this method after editing segments directly.

void SegmentsChanged()

Examples

Sample Snippet

void SetCircle(IPoint cp, double circleRadius)

cp IPoint
circleRadius double

inEnvelope IEnvelope

SetSegmentCollection(ISegmentCollection) 

void SetSegmentCollection(ISegmentCollection newSegments)

Parameters

newSegments ISegmentCollection

SetSegments(int, ref ISegment)

Replaces all segments with references to the input segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void SetSegments(int Count, ref ISegment newSegments)

Parameters

Count int
newSegments ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

SynchronizeEmptyAttributes()

If, at end point shared by two segments, one segment has an empty value for an attribute and the other has a non-empty value, use the non-empty value for both.

void SynchronizeEmptyAttributes()
